use_cases: Creating animated hero sections with pulsing gradient beam effects
Adding visual depth and movement to landing pages
Enhancing marketing pages with dynamic atmospheric backgrounds
Building decorative page overlays with SVG-based pulsing animations
Creating attention-grabbing visual backgrounds for any content section
ai_summary: A decorative SVG-based background component that renders animated pulsing beam effects using Framer Motion. The component creates dynamic gradient animations that pulse and morph from multiple connection points, combining animated paths with customizable color schemes. Ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and any area requiring visual depth and atmospheric movement to capture user attention.
